_meta.note: ALL settings shown here are controllable via wp-admin/admin.php?page=apollo-settings. Stored as a single serialized array in wp_option apollo_admin_settings. Each section key is the plugin slug (or '_global' for brand settings).

_global.label: Global / Marca
_global.description: Brand configuration applied across all Apollo templates

fields.label: Nome da Marca
fields.description: Displayed in headers, emails, and UI chrome throughout Apollo templates

fields.label: Cor Principal
fields.description: Primary accent color applied as CSS variable --apollo-color

fields.label: Modo Escuro Padrão
fields.description: Activates dark theme by default; users can override via preference

fields.label: Interface Compacta
fields.description: Reduces spacing and padding for information-dense layouts

apollo-core.label: Core
apollo-core.description: Core platform settings — CPT registries, debug tools, cleanup behavior

fields.label: Modo Debug
fields.description: Outputs registry diagnostics to Apollo REST /health endpoint and error_log

fields.label: Limpar dados ao desinstalar
fields.description: When true, uninstall.php drops ALL Apollo custom tables and transients. Irreversible.

apollo-login.label: Login & Registro
apollo-login.description: Authentication flow, registration options, URL masking, wp-login hardening

fields.label: Habilitar Registro
fields.description: If false, /registre redirects to /acesso and registration REST returns 403

fields.label: Quiz de Registro
fields.description: Shows the gamified interest quiz on step 7 of the multi-step registration form

fields.label: Redirecionar após login
fields.description: URL path where users are sent after successfully logging in. Use /explore for social feed, /painel for dashboard.

fields.label: Desabilitar /wp-login.php
fields.description: URLRewriter maps wp-login.php → /acesso (custom login) and returns 404 for direct access. 7G Firewall blocks brute-force.

apollo-users.label: Usuários & Perfil
apollo-users.description: User profiles, discovery features, matchmaking, default role assignment

fields.label: Radar de Usuários
fields.description: Enables /radar page and GET /apollo/v1/users/radar endpoint — new user discovery system

fields.label: Matchmaking por sons
fields.description: Enables GET /apollo/v1/users/{id}/matchmaking — finds users with overlapping sound taxonomy interests

fields.label: Papel padrão de novos usuários
fields.description: WordPress role slug assigned on registration: 'subscriber', 'contributor', or a custom Apollo role

apollo-membership.label: Gamificação & Conquistas
apollo-membership.description: Points, badges, ranks, and leaderboard system (Open Badge v2 compatible)

fields.label: Sistema de Pontos
fields.description: Enables point awarding/deduction via triggers and manual admin tools

fields.label: Sistema de Badges / Conquistas
fields.description: Enables achievement tracking and the Open Badge v2 evidence/verify flow

fields.label: Sistema de Níveis / Ranks
fields.description: Enables rank hierarchy and automatic promotion based on point thresholds

fields.label: Pontos por publicação
fields.description: Points awarded when a user publishes any CPT. Applies to event, dj, classified, doc.

apollo-social.label: Feed Social
apollo-social.description: Activity stream, follow system, and wow (reaction) features on the social feed

fields.label: Feed de Atividade
fields.description: Enables the /explore and /mural social feed pages and GET /apollo/v1/feed endpoint

fields.label: Sistema de Follow
fields.description: Enables follower/following relationships (stored in apollo_connections)

fields.label: Reações no feed
fields.description: Enables wow reactions on activity posts. Uses apollo-wow endpoints with context=activity

apollo-chat.label: Mensagens & Chat
apollo-chat.description: Direct messages and group chat configuration

fields.label: Mensagens Diretas
fields.description: Enables /mensagens page and POST /apollo/v1/chat/threads (1-to-1 threads)

fields.label: Chat em Grupo
fields.description: When enabled, allows creating threads with multiple participants

fields.label: Comprimento máximo da mensagem (chars)
fields.description: Character limit per message. Server-side validation rejects messages exceeding this.

apollo-groups.label: Grupos & Comunidades
apollo-groups.description: Group (nucleo / comuna) creation and membership limits

fields.label: Sistema de Grupos
fields.description: Enables /grupos, /nucleos, /comunas pages and all /apollo/v1/groups endpoints

fields.label: Máximo de grupos por usuário
fields.description: Maximum groups a single user can create. Membership (joining) is unlimited.

apollo-email.label: Email
apollo-email.description: Transactional email configuration — SMTP, queue, sender identity

fields.label: Nome do Remetente
fields.description: Displayed as the sender name in all transactional emails

fields.label: Email do Remetente
fields.description: Sent as From header. Must be a verified domain if using external SMTP.

fields.label: Fila de envio
fields.description: Queues emails in apollo_email_queue and sends via WP-Cron for better deliverability

fields.label: Host SMTP
fields.description: External SMTP server hostname. Leave blank to use wp_mail() default (local PHP mail).

fields.label: Porta SMTP
fields.description: SMTP port. 587=STARTTLS (recommended), 465=SSL, 25=plain

apollo-events.label: Eventos
apollo-events.description: Event RSVP, ticketing, calendar features and default currency

fields.label: RSVP
fields.description: Enables POST /events/{id}/attendees and the RSVP UI on event pages

fields.label: Ingressos
fields.description: Enables ticket pricing fields and payment integrations on events

fields.label: Calendário
fields.description: Enables GET /events/calendar/{year}/{month} and calendar views on archive-event.php

fields.label: Moeda padrão
fields.description: ISO 4217 currency code used when enable_tickets=true. BRL, USD, EUR.

apollo-djs.label: DJs
apollo-djs.description: DJ profile and carousel display settings

fields.label: Perfis de DJ
fields.description: Enables /djs and /dj/{slug} pages and all /apollo/v1/djs endpoints

fields.label: Carrossel de DJs
fields.description: Enables [apollo_dj_carousel] shortcode to display a featured DJ carousel

apollo-loc.label: Locais (GPS)
apollo-loc.description: Location mapping and geocoding. NEVER use venue/local/location — always 'loc'.

fields.label: Mapas
fields.description: Enables [apollo_map] shortcode and the /mapa page. Uses Leaflet.js.

fields.label: Geocodificação
fields.description: Enables GET /locals/nearby?lat=&lng=&radius= endpoint for proximity search

fields.label: Cidade padrão
fields.description: Default city used for map center coordinates when no geolocation is available

apollo-notif.label: Notificações
apollo-notif.description: Push and email digest notification settings

fields.label: Notificações Push (Web Push)
fields.description: Enables the Web Push API flow. Requires VAPID keys (set separately via raw options). GET /notifications/push/vapid-public-key must return a key.

fields.label: Digest de Email
fields.description: Aggregates notifications and sends periodic summary emails via apollo-email

fields.label: Frequência do Digest
fields.description: How often the digest email is sent when enable_email_digest=true

apollo-dashboard.label: Painel do Usuário
apollo-dashboard.description: User dashboard widget and moderation queue settings

fields.label: Publicação Rápida
fields.description: Shows quick-publish compose box on /painel for creating events and classifieds

fields.label: Fila de moderação no painel
fields.description: Shows moderation queue widget on /painel for users with the 'moderator' role

fields.label: Gerenciador de Shortcodes
fields.description: Enables the shortcode manager UI in wp-admin and GET /shortcodes REST endpoint

apollo-templates.label: Templates
apollo-templates.description: Canvas template system and archive override settings

fields.label: Blank Canvas
fields.description: Enables zero-theme templates (no wp_head/wp_footer — login, register, sign use this). Disabling falls back to active theme.

fields.label: Sobrescrever páginas de arquivo
fields.description: When true, Apollo templates take over archive-{cpt}.php even if the active theme defines them

apollo-docs.label: Documentos
apollo-docs.description: Document management versioning and table of contents

fields.label: Versionamento
fields.description: Saves each file upload as a new version in apollo_doc_versions (Git-like history)

fields.label: Sumário (Table of Contents)
fields.description: Auto-generates TOC from headings when rendering document content

apollo-secure-upload.label: Upload Seguro
apollo-secure-upload.description: File upload restrictions and malware scanning

fields.label: Tamanho máximo de arquivo (MB)
fields.description: Maximum upload size in megabytes. Enforced server-side on all Apollo upload endpoints.

fields.label: Scan de malware
fields.description: Runs ClamAV (if installed) or signature-based check on uploaded files before saving

fields.label: Tipos permitidos
fields.description: Comma-separated list of allowed file extensions. Case insensitive.

apollo-webp-compressor.label: WebP & Compressão
apollo-webp-compressor.description: Automatic image conversion and quality settings

fields.label: Converter para WebP automaticamente
fields.description: Converts uploaded images (PNG/JPG) to WebP on save using GD or Imagick

fields.label: Qualidade WebP (1-100)
fields.description: WebP encoding quality. 82 is optimal for web (good quality, ~50% size reduction vs JPG)

fields.label: Busca de Hubs
fields.description: Enables GET /hubs and hub discovery across the platform

fields.label: Diretório de Hubs
fields.description: Shows a public hub directory page for browsing creators

apollo-cdn.label: CDN
apollo-cdn.description: CDN URL override and asset minification

fields.label: CDN URL
fields.description: Override APOLLO_CDN_URL constant. Leave blank to use default https://cdn.apollo.rio.br/v1.0.0/

fields.label: Minificar JavaScript
fields.description: Minifies inline JS output from Apollo templates before sending to browser

fields.label: Minificar CSS
fields.description: Minifies inline CSS output from Apollo templates

fields.label: Cor de Destaque Admin
fields.description: Accent color for Apollo's wp-admin sidebar and UI components

apollo-mod.label: Moderação
apollo-mod.description: Content moderation queue and auto-moderation thresholds

fields.label: Moderação Automática
fields.description: Automatically hides content when report count reaches report_threshold. Requires manual review.

fields.label: Limite de denúncias para auto-moderação
fields.description: Number of distinct-user reports before auto_mod hides the content (if auto_mod=true)

apollo-coauthor.label: Coautoria
apollo-coauthor.description: Coauthor feature for shared content attribution

fields.label: Sistema de Coautoria
fields.description: Enables PUT /coauthors/{post_id} and the coauthor taxonomy on CPTs: event, dj, classified, doc

fields.label: Exibir coautores no frontend
fields.description: Shows the coauthor attribution section on single-{cpt}.php templates

apollo-statistics.label: Estatísticas
apollo-statistics.description: Analytics event tracking and data retention policy

fields.label: Rastrear logins
fields.description: Records login events to apollo_stats_users table (privacy-conscious — no IP stored)

fields.label: Rastrear visualizações de página
fields.description: Records pageview events (canvas template views) to apollo_stats_content

fields.label: Retenção de dados (dias)
fields.description: Stat records older than this are purged by daily WP-Cron job. Minimum 7.

apollo-hardening.label: Segurança & Hardening
apollo-hardening.description: WordPress hardening features (managed by apollo-login security classes)

fields.label: Desabilitar XML-RPC
fields.description: Disables XML-RPC interface via WPHardening class. Removes Attack surface.

fields.label: Bloquear REST API anônimo (exceto apollo/v1)
fields.description: Returns 401 for unauthenticated requests to /wp-json/wp/v2/ while keeping apollo/v1 open

fields.label: Remover headers de versão
fields.description: Removes X-Powered-By, WP version from HTTP headers via SecurityHeaders class

fields.label: Bloqueio por tentativas malsucedidas
fields.description: Enables Lockout class — blocks IP after lockout_attempts failed logins

fields.label: Tentativas antes do bloqueio
fields.description: Number of failed login attempts before IP is temporarily blocked (Duration: apollo_lockout_duration)

apollo-adverts.label: Classificados / Anúncios
apollo-adverts.description: Classified ad creation and moderation settings. NEVER use venue/local/location — use loc.

fields.label: Sistema de Classificados
fields.description: Enables /anuncios, /anuncio/{slug}, /criar-anuncio pages and /apollo/v1/classifieds REST

fields.label: Requer aprovação moderação
fields.description: When true, new classifieds go to 'pending' status and require mod approval before public display

fields.label: Diretório de Fornecedores
fields.description: Enables /fornecedores and /fornecedor/{slug} industry-only pages and REST endpoints

apollo-comment.label: Depoimentos
apollo-comment.description: Comment/review system — ALWAYS called 'depoimento', NEVER 'comment' or 'review'

fields.label: Reações em depoimentos
fields.description: Allows wow reactions on depoimento entries (requires apollo-wow active)

fields.label: Threading de depoimentos
fields.description: Allows nested reply threads on depoimentos (parent_id field in REST POST body)

apollo-fav.label: Favoritos
apollo-fav.description: Favorites system — ALWAYS called 'fav', NEVER 'interesse', 'interest', or 'bookmark'

fields.label: Favoritos
fields.description: Enables /favs REST endpoints and [apollo_fav] [apollo_my_favs] shortcodes

apollo-wow.label: Wows (Reações)
apollo-wow.description: Reaction system — ALWAYS called 'wow', NEVER 'like', 'heart', or 'reaction'

fields.label: Sistema de Wows
fields.description: Enables /wows REST endpoints for adding/removing wow reactions on any post

fields.label: Tipos de Wow disponíveis
fields.description: Comma-separated list of wow type slugs. Each slug needs a corresponding entry in apollo_wow_types table.

apollo-rio.label: PWA (Progressive Web App)
apollo-rio.description: Web App Manifest and Service Worker settings
apollo-rio.note: This section managed by apollo-pwa, stored under key 'apollo-rio' for legacy registry compatibility

fields.label: Nome da App
fields.description: Full name shown in OS install prompt and splash screen

fields.label: Nome curto da App
fields.description: Short name (max 12 chars) shown on home screen icon label

fields.label: Cor do tema PWA
fields.description: Browser chrome and OS task-bar color when app is installed

fields.label: Ativar Service Worker
fields.description: Registers /sw.js for offline capability and background sync. Disable for debugging.

raw_options._note: These WP options are NOT exposed in the Apollo admin UI. They are set directly via code constants, WP-CLI, or wp_update_option(). Cross-reference with code files before modifying.

apollo-login.label: Lockout: máximo de tentativas
apollo-login.note: Mirrors apollo-hardening.lockout_attempts — kept separate for runtime override

apollo-login.label: Flush rewrites pendente
apollo-login.note: Set to true on activation. Causes flush_rewrite_rules() on next request then deleted.

apollo-notif.label: VAPID Public Key (Web Push)
apollo-notif.set_via: POST /apollo/v1/notifications/push/subscribe (auto-generated on first use) or wp_update_option()

apollo-notif.label: VAPID Private Key (Web Push)
apollo-notif.security: SENSITIVE — never expose in REST responses

apollo-email.label: Email settings legacy array
apollo-email.note: Separate from apollo_admin_settings['apollo-email']. Legacy compatibility. Keys: from_name, from_email, enable_queue, smtp_host, smtp_port, smtp_user, smtp_pass.

apollo-membership.label: Trigger → point mapping
apollo-membership.note: Maps trigger slug to point value. E.g. { 'event_published': 10, 'first_login': 5 }

apollo-adverts.label: Spam detection log array
apollo-adverts.note: Auto-managed by SpamProtection. Array of {ip, timestamp, classified_id} for rate-limiting repeated classified submissions.

apollo-seo.label: SEO settings
apollo-seo.note: Managed by apollo-seo/src/Settings.php — admin page: wp-admin/admin.php?page=apollo-seo. Constant APOLLO_SEO_OPTION defined at line 122, used at line 135.

apollo-sheets.label: Sheets index
apollo-sheets.note: Auto-managed. Array of { id, post_id, name, slug, columns } for quick lookup without WP_Query.

apollo-chat.label: Tenor GIF API Key
apollo-chat.note: Required for GET /apollo/v1/chat/gif-search proxy. Get key at tenor.google.com/dashboard.

apollo-core.label: CDN scripts registered flag
apollo-core.note: Set to true after CDN scripts are registered on first boot. Prevents double-registration.

apollo-social.label: Social plugin version (installed)
apollo-social.note: Used to trigger DB/rewrite migrations on update.

_summary.last_updated: 2026-02-20 (Settings.php fully read and cross-checked — 32 sections, 84 fields, 0 gaps)
